yummy #junkfood #processedfood #sugar #slop ever have one of those days where you wake up thinking it’s going to be simple, calm, maybe even boring… and then the universe decides to roll out a full-on spectacle? Not a disaster. Not a tragedy. Just a slow, creeping chaos that nudges your plans off the table until all you can do is shrug and say, “Okay… let’s dance.” It’s like suddenly you’re the lead in a story you didn’t audition for. You were just trying to exist quietly, keep to your lane, maybe sip your coffee in peace. And then—bam—a whirlwind of people, events, and random coincidences crashes in. Everything ordinary turns loud, confusing, and somehow hilarious. There’s always that presence. The one that doesn’t leave, no matter how much you wish they would. Persistent, annoying, impossible to ignore. They challenge your patience, test your limits, make you laugh when you least expect it. And slowly, almost imperceptibly, they start to shift the world around you. Things feel lighter. Moments feel brighter. Walls you built begin to crumble. Then comes the unexpected twist. The one that doesn’t fit neatly into your plan, your comfort zone, your carefully curated life. They see past the surface—the tired, guarded exterior—and into the heart underneath. They don’t soften the chaos, they exist within it, and in doing so, force you to see yourself differently. Vulnerable, messy, real. It’s terrifying. It’s exhilarating. It’s alive. We all have our “safe corners,” spaces where the world feels predictable and quiet. But staying there too long? That’s not living. Growth waits in the interruptions, the detours, the moments that throw your day off balance. You don’t need to have a plan. You just need to keep showing up, keep opening doors, keep letting the story surprise you. Life isn’t linear. It’s a winding path of unexpected encounters, awkward coincidences, and loud, uninvited chaos. Some pass through and leave only echoes. Others stay long enough to shift the story, maybe even change it. And all of it—the frustration, the wonder, the laughter, the heartbreak—is yours. It shapes the narrative that only you can tell. So if today feels like a musical number you didn’t ask for, remember: you don’t need everything neat, perfect, or polished. You just need to move forward, to stumble, to dance a little, to let the interruptions in. Because in that chaos, in the mess, in the unplanned moments… that’s where you find the parts of yourself you didn’t know were waiting. And maybe, somewhere in all of it, you discover the story that’s truly yours—wild, imperfect, messy, and unforgettable. #targetaudience

Le chirurgien plasticien José Soler-Baillo, qui exerce à Miami, est devenu viral après la publication de vidéos filmées pendant ses opérations. En plein bloc opératoire, il s’ambiance sur de la house. Une pratique courante chez certains chirurgiens, car la diffusion de musique peut favoriser la concentration et créer un climat de travail plus détendu. Cependant, il est beaucoup plus rare de voir des images tournées pendant les opérations être publiées sur les réseaux sociaux. Crédit : @drsolerbaillo / IG

come with us to get Moosey’s hair cut! 🤍🐾 Cocker spaniels coats take a significant amount of work to upkeep. One piece of that is getting regular grooming! We go every 6-8 weeks, and ask for basically a show cut. Keep the smooth natural coat on top and the longer feathering on his ears, chest, legs, and belly. Just clean him up with trimming and blending so he still looks natural and fluffy in the right places. #englishcockerspaniel #cockerspaniel #cockerspanielpuppy #cockerspanielsoftiktok #cockerspanielgrooming

I know people sometimes wonder why I spend time doing my hair and makeup when I’m “just going to teach,” but the truth is… it makes me feel confident, put together, and like the best version of myself. 🤍 When I look good, I feel good. And when I feel good, I show up better for my students, my classroom, and myself. Teaching takes so much energy, and this is one of the ways I pour back into me. I’ve gotten so many questions about my hair and makeup, so I wanted to finally share some of the things I use and love ✨ Products: @Frankie Rose Cosmetics concealer  @Persona Cosmetics bronzer @Kokie Cosmetics brow pencil @Rare Beauty blush in happy @Laura Mercier translucent powder @Laura Geller Beauty bronzer @NYX Professional Makeup blush @essence.cosmetics eyeliner @Dollar Tree lipstick @wetnwildbeauty lip oil  @ghd USA curve curling iron #TeacherTok #TeachersOfTikTok #ElementaryTeacher #FirstGradeTeacher #ClassroomCommunity

In the One Piece Episode 1163, titled “I Want You to Praise Me - The Reunion of Robin and Saul,” One Piece delivered one of the most emotional reunions in the entire series as Robin finally reunited with Saul after 22 years of pain, loneliness, and survival. The little girl who once lost everything in Ohara finally broke down in tears in front of the man who first told her she deserved to live. When Robin asked, “Can you praise me for holding out this long?”, it felt like decades of heartbreak and silent suffering came pouring out at once. 매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

“But she’s just a corgi…”  Meet Maple the 4 year old Corgi.  Sweet in the right moments… but dangerous in the wrong ones. Resource guarding food and household items. Multiple bites on owners and family members. Reactive to other dogs on walks, barking & lunging. And now there’s a baby in the home. During the evaluation, Maple tried to bite me multiple times. Not because she’s a “bad dog”… But because she’s been making decisions for a long time without clear direction. No real structure. No consistent boundaries. No clear communication or expectations. And when you let “dogs be dogs” they do just that.  This is the part people struggle with.. You can love your dog deeply and still be missing the leadership they actually need. Honest question… Do you think dogs like Maple know they’re doing something wrong… or are they just doing what’s always worked for them? #DogTraining #dogtrainer #dogsoftiktok #dogs #dog

I wash my hands a lot 😂 We sanitize before and after every patient encounter, scrub for surgery, and wash at the end. My hands are very clean 😂 I have eczema and sensitive skin, so can only use certain scrubs and lotions. I like alcohol based scrubs without additives, and I use hand cream to stay hydrated without a greasy feel. The retinol is a huge bonus.    #dayinthelife #neurosurgeon #moisturizer #eczema
